decontamination_notes: Real bug fix from honojs/hono PR #5092 (fixes #5089), merged 2026-07-07, after model training cutoffs. In the hc RPC client (src/client/client.ts), when both client-level and per-request headers were present, deepMerge let the per-request headers replace the client-level ones so only one set was sent. The fix composes a headers function that spreads both (resolving function/object, sync/async) with per-request precedence, then deepMerges. Gold behavior captured empirically via a custom fetch spy (no network, no msw): fn-client + obj-request, obj-client + fn-request, and fn-client + fn-request all carry BOTH headers; per-request-only and same-key precedence are unchanged (regression). Hono is a zero-runtime-dependency TS package with extensionless ESM imports; hidden tests run via tsx (node-ts image) with node:test and capture outgoing headers through the client's custom fetch option. Repo sliced at the PR base commit (75k LOC); MIT LICENSE preserved. Coverage floor: 3 fail_to_pass tests (the three header-source combinations, each failing at base) plus a regression guard.

fail_to_pass.name: fn_client_obj_request
fail_to_pass.cmd: tsx --test --test-name-pattern='^vb merges function client headers with object request headers$' vb_client_headers.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: obj_client_fn_request
fail_to_pass.cmd: tsx --test --test-name-pattern='^vb merges object client headers with function request headers$' vb_client_headers.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: fn_client_fn_request
fail_to_pass.cmd: tsx --test --test-name-pattern='^vb merges function client headers with function request headers$' vb_client_headers.test.ts

pass_to_pass.name: single_side_unaffected
pass_to_pass.cmd: tsx --test --test-name-pattern='^vb per-request headers and same-key precedence unaffected$' vb_regression.test.ts
